query:
-- Keep only the admin user, delete all other test accounts
DELETE FROM users WHERE role != 'admin';
-- Reset the admin's consultation counters to clean state
UPDATE users SET 
  consultationsRemaining = 0,
  freeConsultationsUsed = 0,
  freeConsultationsTotal = 0,
  subscriptionType = 'free'
WHERE role = 'admin';
